title: PDZ Craft
description:
Modpack based on Fab Optimized, with the addition of some mods, resources and shaders.

Made for PDZ
body:
# PDZ Craft

PDZ Craft is a visually stunning modpack designed to take your Minecraft experience to the next level. Inspired by [Fab Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), this modpack enhances the game’s aesthetics while keeping things simple and smooth.

Focused on improving Minecraft’s visuals, trying do it without sacrificing performance, PDZ Craft combines carefully chosen mods that enhance graphics and optimize gameplay. It try's strikes a perfect balance between beauty and functionality.


It includes mods for beautiful textures, shaders, and some performance improvements, all while preserving the essence of Minecraft.

##

### Made for PDZ
